strategies.reason: leverage effect not symmetric Zumbach (NW b_up t=-0.81, b_dn t=+4.60); fails Sharpe-AND-drawdown vs incumbent voltarget_spy (0.80 vs 0.75 Sharpe but worse maxDD -23.7% vs -21.1%, 2.6x turnover)

summary: Model split: 2 Fable agents produced a ranked 10-idea cross-domain backlog (physics+biology); Opus built+self-vetted the top pick (Zumbach vol overlay). REJECTED: it's the leverage effect, not the time-irreversible Zumbach effect, and worsens drawdown vs the incumbent. Backlog is the durable asset (8 ideas queued).
standing_recommendation: voltarget_spy (~76% SPY / 24% cash) remains the only validated strategy
